environment_type: Secondary training setting; ruined Martian city interiors.
visual_summary: A collection of ruined Martian architectural structures consisting of stone training halls, shadowed corridors, and martial instruction spaces. The scale is human-to-Martian, anchored by functional training grounds and domestic or instructional quarters within the ruins.
layout_notes: Anchored by training grounds and domestic/instructional quarters; contains shadowed corridors and stone halls.
lighting: Dimmer than the open plaza; lighting is focused on localized training areas.
constraints: Must maintain a dimmer profile than the open plaza.
Lighting must remain localized to specific training zones.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific layout of domestic vs. instructional quarters is not detailed.
Exact extent of the "ruined" state (degree of decay) is unspecified.
